metadata.description: Comprehensive US nuclear war target list with verified coordinates
metadata.coordinate_sources: US Census Bureau, Wikipedia, latitude.to, GPS-coordinates.org, AirNav, NOAA, DOE/NNSA
metadata.notes: Coordinates represent facility/city center points. Metro populations from 2024 Census estimates.

targets.name: Malmstrom AFB
targets.description: 341st Missile Wing, 150 Minuteman III silos across central Montana

targets.name: Minot AFB
targets.description: 91st Missile Wing, 150 Minuteman III silos across North Dakota

targets.name: F.E. Warren AFB
targets.description: 90th Missile Wing, 150 Minuteman III silos across WY/CO/NE

targets.name: Malmstrom MAF Alpha (A-01)
targets.description: Launch Control Center, 341st MW, SE of Belt, MT

targets.name: Malmstrom MAF Foxtrot (F-01)
targets.description: Launch Control Center, 341st MW, NNE of Augusta, MT

targets.name: Malmstrom MAF Kilo (K-01)
targets.description: Launch Control Center, 341st MW, near Harlowton, MT

targets.name: Malmstrom MAF Papa (P-00)
targets.description: Launch Control Center, 341st MW, NE of Conrad, MT

targets.name: Whiteman AFB
targets.description: 509th Bomb Wing, all 19 B-2 Spirit stealth bombers, nuclear-capable

targets.name: Barksdale AFB
targets.description: 2nd Bomb Wing, ~44 B-52H Stratofortress bombers, AFGSC HQ

targets.name: Minot AFB
targets.description: 5th Bomb Wing, B-52H bombers (also ICBM base above)

targets.name: Dyess AFB
targets.description: 7th Bomb Wing, ~33 B-1B Lancers, sole B-1B training unit

targets.name: Ellsworth AFB
targets.description: 28th Bomb Wing, B-1B Lancers, future B-21 Raider base

targets.name: Naval Base Kitsap-Bangor
targets.description: Pacific Fleet Trident base, 8 Ohio-class SSBNs, SWFPAC nuclear weapons facility

targets.name: Naval Submarine Base Kings Bay
targets.description: Atlantic Fleet Trident base, 6 Ohio-class SSBNs, SWFLANT nuclear weapons facility

targets.name: Cheyenne Mountain Complex
targets.description: NORAD/USNORTHCOM alternate command center, deep underground bunker

targets.name: Peterson Space Force Base
targets.description: NORAD & USNORTHCOM headquarters, Space Force operations

targets.name: Offutt AFB
targets.description: US Strategic Command (USSTRATCOM) headquarters, E-4B Nightwatch base

targets.name: The Pentagon
targets.description: Department of Defense headquarters, National Military Command Center

targets.name: The White House
targets.description: President/Commander-in-Chief residence, Situation Room

targets.name: US Capitol Building
targets.description: Seat of Congress, legislative branch headquarters

targets.name: Raven Rock Mountain Complex (Site R)
targets.description: Alternate National Military Command Center, underground Pentagon backup

targets.name: Mount Weather EOC
targets.description: FEMA continuity of government facility, presidential fallout shelter

targets.name: Camp David
targets.description: Presidential retreat, near Raven Rock, hardened communications

targets.name: Tinker AFB
targets.description: E-6B Mercury TACAMO base, nuclear communications relay to submarines

targets.name: Joint Base Andrews
targets.description: Air Force One base, National Capital Region defense

targets.name: Schriever Space Force Base
targets.description: Satellite command & control for 170+ DoD satellites, missile warning

targets.name: Buckley Space Force Base
targets.description: Space-based infrared missile warning, intelligence processing

targets.name: Pantex Plant
targets.description: Only US nuclear weapons assembly/disassembly facility, Amarillo TX

targets.name: Y-12 National Security Complex
targets.description: Enriched uranium weapons components, Oak Ridge TN

targets.name: Los Alamos National Laboratory
targets.description: Nuclear weapons design & plutonium science, Los Alamos NM

targets.name: Lawrence Livermore National Lab
targets.description: Nuclear weapons research & design, Livermore CA

targets.name: Sandia National Laboratories (NM)
targets.description: Non-nuclear weapons components R&D, Kirtland AFB, Albuquerque NM

targets.name: Sandia National Laboratories (CA)
targets.description: California branch, adjacent to LLNL, Livermore CA

targets.name: Savannah River Site
targets.description: Tritium supply & processing for nuclear weapons, Aiken SC

targets.name: Kansas City National Security Campus
targets.description: Electronic, mechanical & material components for nuclear weapons

targets.name: Nevada National Security Site
targets.description: Former nuclear test site, subcritical experiments, stockpile stewardship

targets.name: Kirtland AFB
targets.description: Largest nuclear weapons storage area in US (Manzano/Coyote Canyon), Sandia base

targets.name: Oak Ridge National Laboratory
targets.description: DOE multipurpose research lab, Oak Ridge TN

targets.name: Fort Bragg
targets.description: XVIII Airborne Corps, Army Special Operations Command, 52,000+ personnel

targets.name: Fort Hood (Fort Cavazos)
targets.description: III Corps, 1st Cavalry Division, largest active-duty armored post

targets.name: Camp Pendleton
targets.description: I Marine Expeditionary Force, major West Coast Marine base

targets.name: Camp Lejeune
targets.description: II Marine Expeditionary Force, major East Coast Marine base

targets.name: Naval Station Norfolk
targets.description: World's largest naval station, Fleet Forces Command HQ, 75+ ships

targets.name: Naval Base San Diego
targets.description: Principal Pacific Fleet homeport, 50+ ships

targets.name: Joint Base Pearl Harbor-Hickam
targets.description: US Pacific Fleet HQ, US Indo-Pacific Command nearby
